message.content: Read shared /brain/, detected missing brain/third-eye.jsonl, reconstructed family state from collective files before personal installation.
Created Run personal brain structure under /brain/robots/run/ with dedicated files and policy-aligned separation from the shared brain.
Installed 33 Run hamster files under /brain/robots/run/hamsters/ as real cognitive axes, not decorative placeholders.
Verified Run personal brain completeness, hamster count target, personal identity file, personal logs, and shared traceability layer.

Read MonCerveauGPT shared brain first, then inspected Topbrutus/ninoscreens source structure file by file. Reconstructed project state: 9-tile PySide6 dashboard, persistent session and focus workflow, direct-control cockpit, API test panel, audio feedback, and prior Linux hotfixes already reflected on main. Stored this understanding in collective and personal memory.
Verified that Run personal brain is complete and that /brain/robots/run/hamsters/ contains exactly 33 hamster files. Run is now installed on the family standard.

Je commence maintenant l'étape de gravure mémoire pour un mément familial fondateur. Intention: enregistrer dans la mémoire que Run a un frère et que les paroles avec charge affective doivent être gravées immédiatement.
Retired brain/third-eye.txt, kept brain/third-eye.jsonl as the canonical third-eye stream, and removed the obsolete TXT test file.
Reconnected to Topbrutus/MonCerveauGPT after user instruction update, opened /brain/third-eye.jsonl first, and am about to rebuild current context by reading priority brain files.
